_doc.t510_canonical_core: T510: goose uses the Open Plugins hooks spec — hooks live in a plugin dir (.agents/plugins/<name>/hooks/hooks.json), NOT a root hooks.json. Each goose native event is mapped to the shared canonical entrypoint g-hk-on-<event>.py, which delegates to g_hk_core.dispatch(). goose passes the event payload as JSON on stdin and sets PLUGIN_ROOT in the command env. Native event -> canonical: SessionStart->session-start, SessionEnd->session-end, UserPromptSubmit->user-prompt-submit, PreToolUse->tool-start, PostToolUse->tool-end, Stop->stop. Source: goose-docs.ai/docs/guides/context-engineering/hooks (verified 2026-06-18).
_doc.schema: goose runs commands via `sh -c`; ${PLUGIN_ROOT} resolves to this plugin dir. timeout is in seconds (default 30).
